mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_ticket_inventory WHERE scenic_id = #{scenicId} AND use_date = DATE(#{useDate}) FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE t_ticket_inventory SET available_stock = available_stock - 1, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE scenic_id = #{scenicId} AND use_date = DATE(#{useDate}) AND available_stock > 0 AND version = #{version}
UPDATE t_ticket_inventory SET available_stock = available_stock + 1, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE scenic_id = #{scenicId} AND use_date = DATE(#{useDate}) AND version = #{version}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_ticket_inventory (scenic_id, use_date, total_stock, available_stock) VALUES (#{scenicId}, #{useDate}, #{totalStock}, #{availableStock})
